assumptions: scan-derived fit context can be routed to simulation-safe interpretation
UX-to-simulation routing should stay simple and traceable
risks: fit guidance may overreach beyond simulation-safe language
scan context may be routed without enough structure
next_required_validation: Hermes review before runtime routing activation
primary_user_goal: Route fit and movement context from UX into simulation-safe guidance logic.
fit_context: Estimated fit profile from scan and user goal.
movement_context: Optional gait and movement-related context from scan flow.
recommendation_context: Use simulation-safe interpretation to support fit guidance only.
ux_recommendation: Use simulation-safe interpretation to support fit guidance and movement-aware UX only.
next_design_step: Route fit-summary, movement-context, and recommendation-support data into Z-Sim for simulation-safe interpretation only.
